items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Witkoff and Kushner to Go to Pakistan for Talks on Iran
items.summary: The two American envoys are expected to leave Saturday for Pakistan. Iran’s foreign minister, Abbas Araghchi, arrived in Islamabad on Friday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Police raid Peru’s election authorities after outcry over slow vote count
items.summary: Anticorruption police gathered material from the homes of ex-election office head Piero Corvetto and other officials.
